description: Fitz visits Skye in quarantine and shares his suspicions, confronting her with data that suggests she experienced Terrigenesis like Raina and is the source of the destruction in the Kree city. Skye panics, causing her powers to manifest uncontrollably. Fitz, disturbed but sympathetic, tries to comfort her despite the frightening revelation.

transcript.line: Can you tell me? I fixed your bio-meter watch, checked your vitals at the time of the temple collapse. Your heart rate was recorded at almost... 300 bpm.
No. That's inhuman. I thought the readings were a mistake, that I put the thing together wrong. Been struggling to, uh, um... something's wrong with the data in my head.

So, I was thinking how the heart monitor seemed to shatter from the inside out, but it was still on your wrist when we found you... that doesn't make sense. And how we found you... basically unharmed in the collapse, with destruction all around you! I thought I was losing my mind all over again... that there was something wrong. So it took a while to dawn on me... or maybe I was just afraid to think it... that... you survived the destruction because... you caused it.
Raina wasn't the only one changed in there. And I'm pretty sure the DNA results we're running right now are gonna confirm it.
There's nothing wrong with the data in my head, Skye.
